'''pangata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xxx|xxx]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xxx|xxx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pangata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængætæth|pængætæth]] || [[word:pængætæj|pængætæj]] || [[word:pængætæsh|pængætæsh]] || [[word:pængætæ|pængætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangangatath|pangangatath]] || [[word:pangangataj|pangangataj]] || [[word:pangangatash|pangangatash]] || [[word:pangangata|pangangata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangatath|pangatath]] || [[word:pangataj|pangataj]] || [[word:pangatash|pangatash]] || [[word:pangata|pangata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangaftath|pangaftath]] || [[word:pangaftaj|pangaftaj]] || [[word:pangaftash|pangaftash]] || [[word:pangaftaf|pangaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pangatatha|pangatatha]] || [[word:pangataja|pangataja]] || [[word:pangatasha|pangatasha]] || [[word:pangataka|pangataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pangatath|pangatath]] || [[word:pangataj|pangataj]] || [[word:pangatash|pangatash]] || [[word:pangata|pangata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pangatathal|pangatathal]] || [[word:pangatajal|pangatajal]] || [[word:pangatashal|pangatashal]] || [[word:pangatakal|pangatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pangatathatha|pangatathatha]] || [[word:pangatajaja|pangatajaja]] || [[word:pangatashasha|pangatashasha]] || [[word:pangataka|pangataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pangatathan|pangatathan]] || [[word:pangatajan|pangatajan]] || [[word:pangatashan|pangatashan]] || [[word:pangatakan|pangatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pangatathaoro|pangatathaoro]] || [[word:pangatajaoro|pangatajaoro]] || [[word:pangatashaoro|pangatashaoro]] || [[word:pangatakaoro|pangatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
